description_long: This is a modern, upholstered lounge chair with a rounded, enveloping backrest and armrests that form a continuous curve around the seat. The chair is covered in a soft, matte gray fabric with subtle vertical stitching along the exterior, giving it a quilted appearance. The seat cushion is thick and plush, topped with a large, rectangular off-white pillow for added comfort. The chair is supported by four slender, metallic legs with a light gold finish, slightly angled for stability. The overall design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both relaxation and stylish urban interiors. The combination of soft upholstery and metallic accents gives it a sophisticated yet cozy look.
description: A modern, rounded lounge chair with gray quilted upholstery, gold metallic legs, and a plush off-white pillow. Its enveloping design and soft materials make it both stylish and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved backrest, thick seat cushion, and off-white pillow, with gold legs visible on either side.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the chair's continuous curved back and armrest, as well as the vertical stitching and one gold leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full curvature of the backrest and the vertical stitched pattern, with all four legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other armrest, the pillow, and the gold leg, emphasizing the chair's enveloping shape.
